subparts.text: Differentiate between CISC and RISC processors.
Convert the following binary number into decimal & octal number: i) ii)
Write functionality of computer instructions, CLA, LDA, OUT, INC, HLT.
Illustrate the phases of Interrupt Cycle with a neat flowchart.
Reduce following Boolean MIN-term and MAX term expression and implement their logic circuit in SOP and POS form. F1 = ∑ + d Y1 = 𝜋 d

Classify different Types of Instructions used in Computer Organization with an example. Write the micro operation required for instruction ADD to AC, c. write the functionality of following micro operations: shl R, shr R, cil R, cir R, , R3<---R1+ R2
What are the three method of signed number representation? Represent decimal numbers 564.40 and 368.75 in 10’s and 9’s complement representation.
Make flow chart of instruction cycle and explain it.
Why addressing modes are required. Differentiate between direct and indirect addressing modes with the help of suitable example.
